chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-925 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2020 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with respondent No.9 Peeral Khan Khoso, Focal Person Sindh Blood transfusion authority Dadu and Muhammad Umar Jamali, A.D.H.O Dadu. == This petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioners, no intimation received. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 05.04.2017 and the learned counsel for the petitioners only shown his appearance before the Court on 19.09.2017, since then, no one is pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
